_publications._publicationTitle: C6 Cell Injection into the Optic Nerve of Long-Evans Rats: A Short-Term Model of Optic Pathway Gliomas.

_contextSnippet: A MATLAB image processing algorithm based on Otsu's method was used... High statistical difference was observed between control and test groups for both markers (P < 0.005)
details: Image processing algorithm based on Otsu's method successfully quantified surface coverage with high statistical significance (P < 0.005) between control and test groups
